name: SIYI Technology
notes: ZR10 (10x), ZR30 (30x), ZT30 (30x+thermal+LRF), A8 mini. MAVLink-compatible.

name: Viewpro
notes: 10x-40x zoom. Z10F, Q10N, A40 Pro, U30TIR. OEM/ODM.

name: Gremsy
notes: Zio (20x optical/30x), Vio (20x+thermal+LRF), Orus L (25x). NDAA compliant.

name: DJI
notes: Zenmuse H20 (23x), H30 (34x). Enterprise payloads.

name: Foxtech
notes: EH series, SYK series, SEEKER series, FH series. 10x-40x zoom.

name: Topotek
notes: 10x-90x zoom. KHY10S90, KIP10S4K, SIP30S90. OEM/ODM.

name: Controp Precision Technologies
notes: Israeli defense. STAMP family, iSky family, FOX 450Z (22.5x). Military.

name: Yangda
notes: Sky Eye (30x,40x), Storm Eye (40x+thermal), Recon Eye (115-162g).

name: Zingto (INYYO)
notes: Q350 (30x), Q102 (10x+thermal), Q12L (10x/40x hybrid).

name: JOUAV
notes: MG-120E (30x+thermal), MG-150E (30x+thermal+3km LRF).

name: Trillium Engineering
notes: HD25 (12x), HD40 (30x), HD45, HD80 (132x). Military/defense.

name: NextVision Stabilized Systems
notes: Israeli. Ultra-lightweight micro-gimbals (140g-2kg), up to 80x zoom.

name: Edge Autonomy (Octopus ISR)
notes: E95, E140Z, E180. Up to 90x (SD)/30x (HD). Formerly Octopus ISR.

name: Trakka Systems
notes: TrakkaCam TC-300 (50x continuous zoom). Multi-spectral.

name: Viewsheen
notes: 30x-60x zoom. OEM, Hangzhou. ISO9001.

name: SPI Corp
notes: M2-D (160g EO/IR with zoom), M1-D micro PTZ.

name: Teledyne FLIR
notes: Vue TV128 (16MP+128x zoom), Neutrino ISR (20x MWIR). Primarily thermal.

name: Parrot
notes: ANAFI USA (32x zoom). Integrated drone, gimbal not sold separately.

name: Autel Robotics
notes: DG-L35T (35x), EVO Max 4T (10x continuous). Integrated drone payloads.

name: Shotover
notes: G1, K1, M1, F1 cinema gimbals. Heavy, expensive. Cinema/broadcast.

name: CZI
notes: C30N and other mission payloads with zoom and thermal.

name: AeroVironment
notes: Uses Trillium gimbals. Partners, doesn't manufacture own gimbals.

name: GWD Bio-intelligence
notes: A30TR (30x+thermal+LRF), A40 Pro (40x), Z36T (36x). 16+ years.

name: UXV Technologies
notes: Optroxa GMB-450 (450g, 18x+LWIR+LRF), GMB-600 (18x).

name: Skydroid
notes: C20 (22x optical zoom, night vision). Also C11, C12.

name: Xingkai Technology
notes: XK-F510rs (20x), XK-FG100 (10x+thermal), XK-FG400 (30x+thermal).

name: Forbao Technology
notes: Sky Eye-30HZ (30x), Eagle Eye-30IE-Lite (30x+thermal). Possible Yangda rebrand.

name: Shenzhen Smart Drone UAV
notes: G10D (10x+thermal+AI). OEM/ODM white-label.

name: JTT
notes: 30x zoom payloads for rescue drones.

name: CUAV
notes: Q10F (10x, 413g). Viewpro OEM.

name: Aero Sentinel
notes: Israeli. Kfir, Snunit (180g), Dror (115g) EO-IR turrets with zoom.

name: Copterlab
notes: Custom gimbal platforms. Customer supplies cameras. Not a complete gimbal+camera maker.

name: UAVForDrone
notes: 10x-40x zoom gimbals. May be reseller/white-label.
